/- 
Define the space-constructible function notion.
A function is space-constructible if there exists a deterministic 
Turing machine that can compute it within space O(s(n)).
-/
def space_constructible (s : ℕ → ℕ) : Prop :=
  ∃ (M : ℕ → ℕ), ∀ n, M n ≤ s n
